# Warn on unguarded pointer in a nested field chain.

check-templates -w
stderr 'accessing .Value on pointer type \*example.com/app.Inner may panic if nil.* \(W003\)'

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"fmt"
	"html/template"
	"io"
)

var (
	//go:embed *.gohtml
	source embed.FS

	templates = template.Must(template.New("app").ParseFS(source, "*"))
)

type Inner struct {
	Value string
}

type Page struct {
	Inner *Inner
}

func render(p Page) {
	_ = templates.ExecuteTemplate(io.Discard, "index.gohtml", p)
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint

-- index.gohtml --
<h1>{{.Inner.Value}}</h1>
